headline: Kraft Heinz (KHC) Valuation Check As Corporate Split Pause And Refocus Plan Test Investor Patience
summary: Kraft Heinz (KHC) has put its planned corporate split on hold, choosing instead to commit US$600 million to new products and select price cuts as it tackles weakening sales and tighter margins. See our latest analysis for Kraft Heinz. The pause on the split comes after a weak run for investors, with the share price at US$24.23 and a slightly negative year to date share price return. The 1 year total shareholder return of about 17% decline and 3 year total shareholder return of about 25%...
